member.summary: returns key used for encryption (constant value as stopgap)

member.summary: authentication method data type (voice-phone, text-only-phone, email, bank account IBAN no)

member.summary: authentication method data (phone number, email address, communicator ID)

member.summary: date time when this authentication method has been verified

member.summary: verify given token with stored persistent one

member.name: P:nxm.system.security.actors.iauthentication_method.last_verified
member.summary: date time when this authentication method has been verified

member.summary: fixed id of default secure-actor-data provider service

member.name: T:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error
member.summary: error codes defined in this assembly

member.name: F:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error.ERROR_SEC_ACCOUNT_DOESNT_EXISTS
member.summary: account with given login doesn't exists

member.name: F:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error.ERROR_SEC_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_EXISTS
member.summary: account with given login already exists

member.name: F:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error.ERROR_SEC_ACCESS_DENIED
member.summary: specified user has beed denied from performing secured operation {0}

member.name: F:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error.ERROR_SEC_VERSION_TOO_OLD
member.summary: application version too old. acquire update

member.name: F:nxm.system.security.nxm_security_error.ERROR_SEC_WRONG_VMETHOD_DATA
member.summary: verification method data are incorrect (must be email or phone)

member.summary: nxm.messages.core extension services provider - each method returns specific service type

member.summary: STOP GAP - replace with dedicated iauthorization_service_host's properties/methods
